text:
[name of advocate] is entitled to a bolt on because they are representing a person who has difficulty in giving instructions or understanding advice;

all advocates are entitled to a bolt on because an independent expert witness was cross-examined and substantially challenged by a party at the hearing; and

the advocates’ bundle page count is [number].

Child[ren]’s current arrangements

The child[ren] [is] / [are] living with [name(s)] and [is] [are] having contact with the parent[s] [name(s)].

Allocation

The proceedings are allocated to [name of judge].

Timetable for the proceedings

26 weeks from the date of issue of these proceedings will expire on [date].

Timetable for the child[ren]

The key dates for the child[ren] are as follows:

[Moves of school] / [Start of new [school term] / [academic year]]: [dates]

[Medical] / [Psychological] treatment: [dates]

LAC reviews: [dates]

Threshold

The threshold criteria are [agreed] / [in dispute] / [in dispute subject to concessions made].

Key issues

The key issues in the case are:

[insert]

Parties’ positions

The parties’ positions are:

[insert]

Alternative carers

The following person[s] [is] / [are] identified as possible alternative carer[s]: [names(s)]

The parties have identified all the persons they wish to be assessed as possible alternative carers and the court has explained to them that any persons identified by them in the future may not be assessed due to the delay not being consistent with the timetable for the child[ren].

Other relevant matters

The local authority sent an Annex 1 request for disclosure to [name of police force] on [date], the response to which is due on [date 20 working days after request made].
